journey.name: Series Screen
journey.description: Verifies the series detail screen shows cover, metadata, and chapter list, and navigation to the reader works for both novels and manhwa.

actions.action: Launch the ReaderParser app and navigate to a series detail screen.
Verify that the series cover image is displayed.
Verify that the series title is visible.
Verify that the series description is visible.
Verify that a chapter list is displayed.
Scroll down through the chapter list.
Tap the first chapter in the list.
Verify that the reader screen is displayed.
